tone_per_persona.General: Welcoming, jargon-free, action-oriented. Assume no prior Starboard knowledge.
tone_per_persona.User: Task-focused, practical, shows expected output. Assume Databricks familiarity but not Starboard internals.
tone_per_persona.Developer: Precise, reference-heavy, includes code snippets and file paths. Assume Python and FastAPI fluency.
tone_per_persona.Admin: Operations-focused, includes commands and config. Assume infrastructure and deployment experience.

content_standards.code_block_conventions: Use fenced code blocks with language identifier. Include file path as comment on first line for source references. Use placeholder values that are obviously fake.
content_standards.callout_format: Use MkDocs admonition syntax: !!! note, !!! warning, !!! danger, !!! tip.
content_standards.step_format: Numbered steps with bold action verb lead. Each step has exactly one action. Include expected output or verification after each step.
content_standards.version_tagging: Include 'Last verified: YYYY-MM-DD' in front matter or first line.
content_standards.diagram_captioning: Every Mermaid diagram must have a caption line immediately below: *Figure N: Description.*

verified_facts.agent_domains: router, query, job, uc, cluster, analytics, diagnostic, warehouse, discovery
verified_facts.deprecated_domain_names: table and compute (should be uc and cluster)

document_briefs.title: Quickstart
document_briefs.audience_description: New users setting up Starboard for the first time.
document_briefs.purpose: Get a user from zero to a working Starboard instance with verified health check and first analysis in under 10 minutes.
critical_fixes: Replace /api/chat/health with /health/live and /health/ready
Use databricks-claude-sonnet-4-5 as default model consistently
Verify /api/chat/conversations endpoint path

document_briefs.purpose: Single authoritative reference for all HTTP API endpoints with accurate paths and schemas.

validation_checklist: Zero occurrences of /api/chat/health in any document
Zero occurrences of starboard_server.api.main in any document
Zero occurrences of deprecated domain names 'table' or 'compute'
Tool Catalog covers all 9 domains with correct counts
API Reference paths match actual APIRouter declarations
